{{Quote|This should be easy. Just plant some charges, watch the fireworks, and come home. What can go wrong?|[[Kyle Katarn]]|audio=KyleOrdMantell.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>}}
The '''Mission to Ord Mantell''' was carried out by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaden Korr]] for the [[New Jedi Order]]. After learning of reports about a large weapons stockpile in the wastes of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], Korr was sent to destroy it, to prevent it from falling into the wrong hands.

==The mission==
[[File:Ord_Mantel_weapons_depot.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A map of the weapons depot]]
Korr arrived on Ord Mantell and destroyed one of the weapons caches. However, before he could proceed, he encountered [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. Obviously intent on taking the weapons for his own use, Fett told the young Jedi Knight to leave. However, Korr refused and evaded the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] as he went on to destroy the rest of the stockpile.

However, Korr was unable to leave, as Fett prevented him from entering his [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] ''[[Far Wanderer]]''. Korr faced off with Fett and, after he proved to be too much of a challenge, the bounty hunter fled.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
